Tools
LAUNCH ESSENTIALS
Where to start…
• A domain and a Squeeze Page (could be your own
website or via something like Leadpages)
• A lead magnet to offer via your Squeeze Page
• An email management system to communicate to
prospects
• Once that’s in place, you can start building your list
while you work on creating your product and
preparing to launch.
One of the big questions… All in One or À la Carte
• All in One (example: Kajabi)
• PROS: ease of use, ease and speed of
implementation, everything under one roof, one
stop customer support
• CONS: you may not want / need all the features
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 4 --

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved.
One of the big questions… All in One or À la Carte
• À la Carte (example: Wordpress with numerous
plugins)
• PROS: greater control and adaptability (you add
features as you need them and can adapt as your
business grows).
• CONS: higher likelihood of something breaking,
not as easy to manage on your own
Considerations
• Price / Budget
• Speed of Implementation
• Features and Integrations
• Future growth
• Keep in mind…there are no perfect solutions
Recommended Resources to Get Started
Quickly…
• There are lots of options out there
• These are tools we’ve used and are great for starting
out
• Each tool has their own tutorials for learning to use
them
• Resources:
• Setting up a Website and Building Your List
• Creating Your Lead Magnet and Product
• Launching and Delivering Your Product
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved.
• Domains: GoDaddy
• Website: WordPress.org or Kajabi
• Squeeze Page / Opt-in Form: LeadPages
• Collect and Manage Emails: Aweber
1. Setting up a Website and Building Your List
• Email series (autoresponder): Aweber
• Digital documents: Canva, Adobe PDF Creator,
Google Docs
• Video lessons: Vimeo or Wistia
• Physical products (CDs, etc.): Disk.com
2. Creating Your Lead Magnet and Product
• Pre-Prelaunch Survey: Surveymonkey.com
• Emails: Aweber
• Squeeze Page: LeadPages
• Hosting your Product (course): Kajabi, or
Wordpress.org with plugins
• Prelaunch Content and Sales Video: Logitech
Camera w/built in mic and Camtasia for editing
• Shopping Cart: 1shoppingcart
3. Launching and Delivering Your Product
